_publications._publicationTitle: Hybrid Minigene Assay: An Efficient Tool to Characterize mRNA Splicing Profiles of

_contextSnippet: when expressed from the minigene construct, did not affect transcript maturation in HEK293 cells...expression of the minigene yielded a splicing pattern characterized by more products
details: Successfully expressed minigene constructs and allowed detection of aberrant splicing patterns, including multiple splicing products and residual wild-type transcript quantification
